name: Broccoli-Spinach Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Broccoli, cut into 1/4-inch pieces, including stem
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium-low heat.
2. Add cumin and crushed red pepper flakes; fry for 30 seconds to 1 minute.
3. Stir in lime juice, salt, black pepper, broccoli, water, and spinach.
4. Cover the pan and simmer until the vegetables are reduced to a chunky puree (45 to 60 minutes). Stir occasionally.
5. Immediately before serving, spread about 2 tablespoons of the mixture on poppy seed crackers.
6. Sprinkle with grated coconut.
